channel.title: Business on El rincón del introvertido
channel.description: Recent content in Business on El rincón del introvertido

item.title: My Projects
item.description:
Here is an incomplete list of the projects I created over time. If a project generated revenue I put a $ sign corresponding to each digit in the total revenue for the project. ✝ - means project is discontinued.

  • Simple Calorie Counter 2026 - more about the idea in github repo here https://github.com/mylh/ccnt
  • Sellvance 2024 - The next-generation AI-powered sales engagement platform. My new exciting venture. Currently under heavy development but I already use it to sell my services
  • FetchBytes.com 2024 - Simple, Powerful Web Scraping and Automation API. Expansion from BotProxy - web scraping on steroids :)
  • ChatGPT Name Generator 2023 - Utiltiy to generate project names given description and check domain name availablity
  • Ema - Emacs Mindful Assistant 2023 - ChatGPT based assistant for Emacs
  • DreamStaging.AI ✝ 2023 $$$ - Virtual Staging and Interior Design by AI: drop a photo of an empty room and get it back with furniture and decoration in variety of styles
  • IndieHacker Boilerplate 2022 - Template project to build websites with Django, React and Bootstrap
  • DreamPic.AI ✝ 2022-2024 $$$$$ - A tool to generate pictures of You in different styles using AI with finetuned StableDiffusion model (discontinued, more here)
  • Georginify 2022 - Firefox extension that helps learn Georgian alphabet
  • FOrganizer 2020 - forganizer is an utility that organizes files into foldres according to file modification date. I’ve been using it since to organize my photo archive
  • DeepWebMonitor ✝ (2020-2022) $$$$ - Website change monitoring and alerting
  • MicroFeedback ✝ (2018-2019) - Collect feedback using unique time spaced single question surveys.
  • LottoClues 2017 $$$$$ - Lottery Results tracking and analysis monetized by AdSense
  • BotProxy 2017 $$$$$$ - Rotating proxies as a service SAAS
  • SeoCharger.com ✝ - SEO checker that crawls whole website and generates reports. SAAS.
  • Top1M ✝ - analyze Top 1M websites from Alexa list to get ideas of fastest growing businesses
  • JA ✝ (2015-2020) $$$$$$ - Content website with AdSense monetization
  • Alovendo ✝ - Shopping cart SAAS written in Haskell!
  • Recipes ✝ - recipes and nutrition database
  • HealthKeeper 2007 ✝ - windows app to alert you to take a break
  • TheBridge ✝ $$$ - online community
  • Simplistity ✝ - create and manage arbitrary lists online
  • I Was Here ✝ - create and manage your travel map
